text_block_list.text:
Fans go wild for Narita Brian after she takes the
Satsuki Sho, certain she can become the next
Triple Crown Champion. The impact also spreads
to the other racers in her year.

Narita Brian feels an elation unprecedented for
her after learning that there are other exceptional
racers in her year.

We decide to run in the second race of the
Classic Triple Crown—the Japanese Derby.
